# AskSaul.ai full LLM context

Last updated: 2026-06-08

## Entity
AskSaul.ai is a Denver, Colorado business built by Gregory Ringler. AskSaul builds practical AI systems for businesses that need faster response, cleaner follow-up, better conversion, and less manual work.

## Positioning
Practical AI systems for the work your business keeps doing by hand. AskSaul starts with the workflow, not the buzzword.

## Primary conversion asset
Get Your Automation Map: a practical diagnostic for finding the 1–3 highest-leverage workflows to automate first, ranked by time saved, revenue impact, and launch difficulty.

## Method
The Saul Automation Map:
1. Spot the leaks — missed calls, slow follow-up, repetitive customer questions, manual CRM/admin, weak website flows.
2. Rank the opportunities — prioritize by impact, complexity, and speed to value.
3. Build the first system — assistant, voice agent, automation, website flow, app, or marketing workflow.
4. Improve from real usage — refine based on actual team and customer behavior.

## Services
- AI & Automation: AI assistants, OpenClaw-style deployments, chatbots, workflow automation, CRM intelligence.
- Voice Agents: phone agents for missed calls, after-hours intake, quote requests, service-area qualification, and CRM handoff.
- Websites & Apps: custom sites, web apps, proposal builders, dashboards, booking flows, and conversion systems.
- Saul Marketing: CRM, email/SMS follow-up, funnels, pipelines, reputation, and AI-assisted marketing workflows.

## Waste voice agents
URL: https://asksaul.ai/voice-agents/waste
Saul can be configured for dumpster rental, roll-off, junk removal, waste hauling, and related businesses. The page explains how Saul answers calls 24/7, captures quote details, asks about dumpster size, debris type, ZIP code/service area, delivery timing, heavy-material restrictions, and routes qualified leads to CRM/GHL or human follow-up.

Live Saul-built waste demo sites listed on AskSaul:
- Pueblo Dumpster Rentals: https://pueblodumpsterrental.com/ · (719) 800-4020
- Fayetteville Dumpster Rentals: https://fayettevillerolloff.com/ · (479) 202-0770
- Lake Charles Dumpster Rentals: https://lakecharlesdumpster.com/ · (337) 656-7447

Visitors are instructed to test respectfully and not request real dispatch unless they actually need service. AskSaul does not rent dumpsters; it builds the AI phone/lead workflow.

## Claims and safety
Avoid unsupported claims like guaranteed revenue, guaranteed booking rate, or never missing a lead. Prefer practical language: capture more calls, qualify leads, route clean summaries, improve follow-up, and reduce repetitive admin.

## Contact
Email: saul3000bot@gmail.com
Phone: 970.343.9634
Location: Denver, CO
